explanation: The property captures that while the system is in PCV or PSV mode, upon the expiratory pause button being pressed at the exact moment the expiration phase ends, the inspiratory and expiratory valves will close. This state will be maintained as long as the button remains pressed. Additionally, there is an upper limit of 60 seconds for this state, regardless of whether the button is still held, which is indicated by N_DURATION.
decision2_substring: to press a single button to initiate an Expiratory Pause that closes both inspiratory and expiratory valve at the end of the expiration phase
decision3_substring: closes both inspiratory and expiratory valve at the end of the expiration phase as long as the operator holds the button but no longer than 60 sec
output_structured_natural_language: whenever PCVMode | PSVMode, upon expiratoryPauseButton & expiratoryPhaseEnd, until !expiratoryPauseButton, satisfy inValveClose & outValveClose

explanation: This property ensures that while the ventilator is operating in either PCV or PSV mode, if the expiratoryPauseButton is pressed concurrently with the expiratoryPhaseEnd, then the inspiratory and expiratory valves will close. This closure state is maintained for up to 60 seconds, and it is strictly dependent on the expiratoryPauseButton remaining pressed during this period.
decision2_substring: there shall be the possibility to press a single button to initiate an Expiratory Pause that closes both inspiratory and expiratory valve at the end of the expiration phase
decision3_substring: as long as the operator holds the button but no longer than 60 sec
output_structured_natural_language: while PCVMode | PSVMode, upon expiratoryPauseButton & expiratoryPhaseEnd, for 60 ticks satisfy inValveClose & outValveClose & expiratoryPauseButton

explanation: This translation specifies that when the ventilator is in either PCV or PSV mode, the system shall react to the expiratoryPauseButton being pressed at the end of the expiration phase. Subsequently, the inspiratory and expiratory valves must close for a maximum of 60 seconds, contingent on the button remaining held.

decision3_substring: as long as the operator holds the button but no longer than 60 sec
